intro_description: The fediverse is made up of many communities and platforms, that all work together instead of competing. You can join any of them and follow and interact with anyone with a single account.
intro_apps_single: And here is a great app you can use.
intro_apps_multiple: And here are just a few of the many apps that you can use.
